texto: What you create doesn't have to be perfect....Don't let fear of failure discourage you. Don't let the voice of critics paralyze you—whether that voice comes from the outside or inside
explicacao: Orientação direta de President Dieter F. Uchtdorf sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “What you create doesn't have to be perfect....Don't let fear of failure discourage you. Don't let…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a coragem, inspirational-attitude, reflexao, útil em momentos de inspiracao e reflexao.

texto: The best way we can honor the pioneers—the best way for us to repay our debt of gratitude to them—goes beyond making and hearing speeches, marching in parades, or attending fireworks celebrations. “The best way we can show our gratitude is by incorporating into our own lives the faithfulness to God’s commandments, the compassion and love for our fellowmen, the industry, optimism, and joy the pioneers demonstrated so well in their own lives.
explicacao: Citação de President Dieter F. Uchtdorf sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The best way we can honor the pioneers—the best way for us to repay our debt of gratitude to them…” articula fe, compassion, faith em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.

frase_original: The best way we can honor the pioneers—the best way for us to repay our debt of gratitude to them—goes beyond making and hearing speeches, marching in parades, or attending fireworks celebrations. “The best way we can show our gratitude is by incorporating into our own lives the faithfulness to God’s commandments, the compassion and love for our fellowmen, the industry, optimism, and joy the pioneers demonstrated so well in their own lives.
